findings.description: Section s1 is well over 2000 characters and the source contains two h3-level subsections (「別ウィンドウにサブミットする場合のJSPの実装例」and「別ウィンドウから元画面に値を設定する場合のJSPの実装例」, both with === underline) that were merged into s1 without splitting. Per V3 rules, when an h2 section has >= 2000 chars of content AND h3 subsections exist, the knowledge file should split them into separate sections.
findings.source_evidence: Source headings: 「別ウィンドウにサブミットする場合のJSPの実装例」(=====) and 「別ウィンドウから元画面に値を設定する場合のJSPの実装例」(=====) are distinct subsections under 「複数ウィンドウを立ち上げたい場合」, each containing substantial implementation examples (JSP code, JavaScript code, warning block).
